messages.text: You there. I could use a steady pair of hands. A rat has been tearing through this field, and I think it has been nosing around an old chest to the west.
Search the chest for anything unusual, then head east and deal with the rat. Find the key before you pick the fight; I want to know what drew the creature here.

options.text: What am I looking for in the chest?
Where can I find the rat?
I'll find the key and deal with the rat.

messages.text: The chest is west of here, near the far edge of the field. It has been sitting there longer than I have.
If there is a key inside, it will not belong to any lock around here. Take it with you. We can worry about what it opens after the field is safe.

options.text: What do I get for this?

messages.text: It prowls southeast of here, beyond the road. Follow the trampled grass and you should find it before it finds your ankles.
Do not let its size fool you. Find the key first, then put the rat down.
I have an ancient scroll tucked away for someone willing to earn it. Clear up this business with the key and the rat, and it is yours.
Good. Search the old chest to the west for the mysterious key, then head southeast and kill the rat. Come back in one piece; the scroll is no use to a corpse.
